creator: sob@academ.com
text:
usg.3 man page refers the reader to the u3g device driver source file, but the location specified is incorrect.

Fix: 

change /sys/dev/u3g.c to /sys/dev/usb/u3g.c in the manual page source.
How-To-Repeat: 	Read the man page. Notice that it says "See /sys/dev/u3g.c..."
